name: Siemens SITRANS TS100 Temperature Transmitter
description: The Siemens SITRANS TS100 is a compact, programmable temperature transmitter for Pt100 RTD and thermocouple sensors. With 4-20 mA output and HART protocol, it provides accurate temperature measurement for process industries.
shortDescription: Programmable temperature transmitter, 4-20 mA/HART, Pt100 and TC input.
technicalDescription: DIN rail mount temperature transmitter with universal sensor input, fully configurable via HART or PC software. Galvanic isolation between input, output, and power supply. 3-year stability guarantee.
features: Universal input for Pt100, TC, mV, and ohm
DIN rail mount for panel installation
benefits: Reduces spare parts inventory with universal input
Simplifies wiring with loop-powered design
Improves measurement accuracy with sensor matching

technicalSpecifications.Input: Pt100, TC (J, K, T, E, R, S, B), mV, Ohm

seoDescription: Siemens SITRANS TS100 programmable temperature transmitter, 4-20 mA/HART, universal input for Pt100 and TC. For process temperature measurement.

faq.question: What is the minimum span?
faq.answer: Minimum span is 10°C for Pt100 and 50°C for thermocouple inputs.

faq.question: Can this be used in hazardous areas?
faq.answer: Yes, it is ATEX and IECEx certified for Zone 1 and Zone 2 installations.

faq.question: What software is used for configuration?
faq.answer: Siemens SIMATIC PDM or any HART-compatible configuration tool.

name: ABB 266 Differential Pressure Transmitter
description: The ABB 266 differential pressure transmitter provides accurate measurement of pressure, flow, and level in process applications. Featuring a MEMS sensor element with advanced digital compensation, it delivers ±0.04% accuracy over a wide turndown range.
shortDescription: Differential pressure transmitter, ±0.04% accuracy, HART, 4-20 mA.
technicalDescription: Smart differential pressure transmitter with MEMS sensor technology, 4-20 mA with HART 7 protocol, and local LCD display. Features include square root extraction for flow, totalizer, and pressure-temperature compensation.
features: HART 7 protocol with Device Type Manager
Local LCD display with engineer units
Square root extraction for flow applications
benefits: Reduces inventory with high turndown ratio
Improves process efficiency with high accuracy
Simplifies commissioning with local display and setup
seoDescription: ABB 2600T Series 266 differential pressure transmitter with ±0.04% accuracy, HART 7, 100:1 turndown. For flow, level, and pressure measurement.

faq.question: What is the maximum working pressure?
faq.answer: The maximum working pressure (MWP) is 160 bar (2,320 psi) for standard models.

faq.question: What materials are available for wetted parts?
faq.answer: Standard is 316L SST. Options include Hastelloy C-276, Monel, and Tantalum for corrosive services.

faq.question: Can this be used for custody transfer?
faq.answer: Yes, with appropriate calibration and certification, it meets custody transfer requirements for natural gas and liquid hydrocarbons.

name: Siemens SITRANS FM MAG 1100 Flow Sensor
description: The Siemens SITRANS FM MAG 1100 is an electromagnetic flow sensor for conductive liquids. With a compact design and no moving parts, it provides maintenance-free flow measurement in water and wastewater applications.
shortDescription: Electromagnetic flow sensor, 4-inch, PTFE lined, 4-20 mA/HART, IP68.
technicalDescription: Bi-directional electromagnetic flow sensor with PTFE liner, Hastelloy C-22 electrodes, and NEMA 6P (IP68) submersible design. Compatible with SITRANS FM MAG 6000 transmitter. Accuracy ±0.2% of rate.
features: No moving parts for maintenance-free operation
PTFE liner for wide chemical compatibility
Hastelloy C-22 electrodes for corrosion resistance
Submersible IP68 design for vault installations
benefits: Zero maintenance with no moving parts
Unobstructed flow path minimizes pressure loss
Accurate measurement regardless of density, viscosity, or temperature
seoTitle: Siemens SITRANS FM MAG 1100 Electromagnetic Flow Sensor
seoDescription: Siemens MAG 1100 electromagnetic flow sensor, 4-inch, PTFE lined, IP68, ±0.2% accuracy. For water, wastewater, and chemical flow applications.

faq.question: What minimum conductivity is required?
faq.answer: The minimum liquid conductivity required is 5 μS/cm for reliable measurement.

faq.question: Can this sensor be installed underground?
faq.answer: Yes, the IP68 submersible rating allows direct burial or installation in flooded vaults.

faq.question: What transmitter options are compatible?
faq.answer: Compatible with Siemens MAG 5000 (standard) or MAG 6000 (advanced) transmitters.

name: Honeywell SmartLine 80 GHz Radar Level Transmitter
description: The Honeywell SmartLine 800 uses 80 GHz FMCW radar technology for precise level measurement in storage tanks and process vessels. The focused beam and advanced algorithms provide reliable measurement through steam, dust, and turbulence.
shortDescription: 80 GHz FMCW radar level transmitter, 30m range, ±1mm accuracy, HART.
technicalDescription: Non-contact radar level transmitter with 80 GHz FMCW technology, 4-20 mA with HART, and graphical LCD display. Parabolic or rod antenna options. Suitable for liquids, slurries, and solids in harsh process conditions.
features: 80 GHz FMCW radar for high accuracy and focus
PTFE encapsulated antenna for corrosive environments
benefits: Eliminates maintenance with non-contact technology
Works reliably in steam, foam, and turbulence
Easy commissioning with graphical echo display
seoTitle: Honeywell SmartLine 80 GHz Radar Level Transmitter
seoDescription: Honeywell SmartLine 800 80 GHz FMCW radar level transmitter, 30m range, ±1mm accuracy. For tanks, vessels, and silos in process industries.

faq.question: What is the minimum dielectric constant?
faq.answer: The 80 GHz radar can measure media with dielectric constant (DC) as low as 1.4.

faq.question: Can this be used in hygienic applications?
faq.answer: Yes, with suitable process connections and PTFE antenna, it meets FDA and EHEDG requirements.

faq.question: What antennas are available?
faq.answer: Parabolic (for long range up to 30m), rod (compact), and drip-off (for condensing vapors).

name: ABB NBB20 Inductive Proximity Sensor
description: The ABB NBB20 is a 20mm inductive proximity sensor for metal object detection in industrial automation. With extended sensing range and rugged metal housing, it provides reliable position detection in machine tools and conveyor systems.
shortDescription: Inductive proximity sensor, 20mm sensing range, PNP NO, M30 housing.
technicalDescription: Inductive proximity sensor with 20mm flush-mount sensing range, PNP normally open output, M30 x 1.5 cylindrical metal housing, and M12 quick-disconnect connector. LED status indication and short-circuit protection.
features: LED status indicator and short-circuit protection
benefits: Increased machine uptime with reliable detection
Reduces installation time with quick-disconnect connector
Extended range allows greater mounting distance
seoDescription: ABB NBB20 M30 inductive proximity sensor, 20mm range, PNP NO, IP68, metal housing. For position detection in manufacturing and material handling.

faq.question: What is the difference between flush and non-flush mount?
faq.answer: Flush mount sensors can be embedded in metal with no reduction in sensing range. Non-flush sensors require a non-metallic zone around the sensing face.

faq.question: Can this detect non-metallic objects?
faq.answer: No, inductive proximity sensors only detect metallic objects.

faq.question: What is the maximum cable length?
faq.answer: With M12 connector and standard cable, maximum length is 100m for 24 VDC operation.

name: Honeywell MSR145 Vibration Sensor
description: The Honeywell MSR145 is a MEMS-based vibration sensor for condition monitoring of rotating machinery. With dual-axis measurement and digital output, it detects early bearing faults, unbalance, and misalignment in pumps, motors, and fans.
shortDescription: Dual-axis MEMS vibration sensor, ±10g range, digital output, IP67.
technicalDescription: MEMS capacitive vibration sensor with dual-axis (±10g) measurement, digital SPI output, and wide frequency response. Integrated temperature sensor. Rugged stainless steel housing for industrial environments.
features: Digital SPI output for direct microcontroller interface
benefits: Early fault detection prevents catastrophic failure
Reduces unscheduled downtime with predictive maintenance
Small form factor allows installation in tight spaces
seoDescription: Honeywell MSR145 dual-axis vibration sensor, ±10g, digital SPI output, IP67. For condition monitoring of pumps, motors, and compressors.

faq.question: What machines can be monitored?
faq.answer: Rotating equipment including pumps, motors, fans, compressors, turbines, and gearboxes.

faq.question: What faults can be detected?
faq.answer: Bearing faults, rotor unbalance, shaft misalignment, gear damage, and cavitation in pumps.

faq.question: How is data transmitted?
faq.answer: The sensor outputs digital SPI. An external data logger or microcontroller is required for FFT processing and analysis.

name: Siemens SIPAN PS pH Sensor
description: The Siemens SIPAN PS is a digital pH sensor with intelligent self-diagnostics for process analytics. With gel-filled reference and double-junction design, it provides accurate pH measurement in chemical, pharmaceutical, and water treatment applications.
shortDescription: Digital pH sensor, double-junction, gel-filled, digital output, built-in diagnostics.
technicalDescription: Digital pH combination electrode with PTFE double junction, gel-filled reference, and integrated temperature sensor. Digital communication with Memosens protocol for plug-and-play operation. Built-in diagnostics monitor glass impedance and reference health.
benefits: Eliminates connection issues with digital signal
Reduces calibration frequency with stable reference
Improves measurement reliability with self-diagnostics
material: Glass Stem, PTFE Junction, PEEK Body
seoTitle: Siemens SIPAN PS Digital pH Sensor
seoDescription: Siemens SIPAN PS digital pH sensor with Memosens, double junction, self-diagnostics. For chemical, pharmaceutical, and water treatment pH measurement.

faq.question: What is Memosens technology?
faq.answer: Memosens is a digital communication protocol that transmits pH, temperature, and diagnostic data via inductive coupling, eliminating galvanic corrosion issues.

faq.question: Can this sensor be sterilized?
faq.answer: Yes, it can withstand sterilization cycles up to 135°C at 3 bar for pharmaceutical and biotech applications.

faq.question: How often does calibration last?
faq.answer: Calibration interval depends on application. Typical interval is 1-3 months in clean water, 1-4 weeks in chemical processes.
